title_original: OpenAI Campus Network: Student club interest form
description: Join the OpenAI Campus Network—connect student clubs worldwide, access AI tools, host events, and build an AI-powered campus community.
title_he: OpenAI Campus Network: Student club interest form
summary_he: OpenAI Campus Network is inviting student clubs from universities worldwide to join a global network of student leaders. The partnership aims to bring AI learning to campus through hands-on experiences, support student-led events, and provide early access to tools and opportunities.
details_he: The OpenAI Campus Network is a collaborative initiative that seeks to empower student leaders in shaping the future of learning and work. By partnering with student clubs, OpenAI aims to bring AI education to a broader audience and foster a community of innovators. Student clubs can benefit from early access to OpenAI's tools, programs, and opportunities, enabling them to stay ahead in the rapidly evolving field of AI.

description: How enterprises scale AI: from early experiments to compounding impact through trust, governance, workflow design, and quality at scale.
summary_he: Organizations that successfully scale AI do not focus solely on implementing the technology, but rather on creating an environment where people trust and adopt it over time. This involves building a culture of literacy and confidence, establishing governance that enables speed, and prioritizing quality and ownership.
details_he: According to interviews with executives from Philips, BBVA, Mirakl, Scout24, Jetbrains, and Scania, the key to scaling AI lies in treating it as an operating layer and leadership discipline. This involves redesigning workflows, building with AI, and establishing hybrid workflows that use AI to augment human reasoning and review. The organizations that have achieved success have done so by prioritizing trust, ownership, and quality from the outset, and by involving security, legal, compliance, and IT in the design process from the beginning. By doing so, they have been able to move faster, with fewer reversals and more trust, and have achieved sustained impact.

title_original: The new AI-powered Google Finance is expanding to Europe.
description: A screenshot of the AI-powered experience on Google Finance.
title_he: The new AI-powered Google Finance is expanding to Europe.
summary_he: Google Finance החדש, שהולך ומתפתח בעזרת AI, נוסה להציע תמיכה שלמה בשפות מקומיות באירופה.
details_he: הגרסה החדשה של Google Finance, שהולך ומתפתח בעזרת AI, נוסה להציע תמיכה שלמה בשפות מקומיות באירופה. כדי לעזור לאנשים להבין טוב יותר את העולם הפיננסי, Google Finance החדש מציע יכולות חדשות. הגרסה החדשה של Google Finance כוללת חיפוש AI-מובנה, כלי גרפי מתקדמים ועדכונים בשידור חי.

title_original: ‘Your Career Starts at the Beginning of the AI Revolution,’ NVIDIA CEO Tells Graduates
description: “You are entering the world at an extraordinary moment,” NVIDIA founder and CEO Jensen Huang told graduates as he delivered the keynote address at Carnegie Mellon University’s 128th commencement ceremony on Sunday. “A new industry is being born. A new era of science and discovery is beginning.” “No generation has entered the world with more […]
title_he: ‘Your Career Starts at the Beginning of the AI Revolution,’ NVIDIA CEO Tells Graduates
summary_he: NVIDIA CEO Jensen Huang told graduates at Carnegie Mellon University that they are entering a world where AI is revolutionizing industries and creating new opportunities. He emphasized that this is a moment for them to shape the future and make their mark.
details_he: Huang drew parallels between the current AI revolution and past technological shifts, such as the PC revolution, and emphasized that AI is driving the largest technology infrastructure buildout in human history. He described AI as a 'once-in-a-generation opportunity to reindustrialize America and restore the nation's capacity to build.' According to Huang, AI is making intelligence more broadly accessible and creating a new industrial era, with the potential to elevate workers and expand human potential.

title_original: MachinaCheck: Building a Multi-Agent CNC Manufacturability System on AMD MI300X
title_he: MachinaCheck: Building a Multi-Agent CNC Manufacturability System on AMD MI300X
summary_he: Team of developers at the AMD Developer Hackathon created a multi-agent AI system called MachinaCheck to simplify the process of determining CNC manufacturability. The system uses a STEP file and user inputs to generate a manufacturability report within 30 seconds, eliminating the need for manual drawing reading and guesswork.
details_he: MachinaCheck was built to address the issue of skilled managers spending hours on feasibility analysis for customer jobs in small CNC machine shops. The system's architecture is designed with privacy in mind, using the AMD Instinct MI300X to run computations on-premise and keep customer intellectual property confidential. The five-component pipeline of MachinaCheck is built with LangChain and orchestrated via FastAPI, utilizing a STEP file parser, a machine learning model, and other components to generate a manufacturability report. This solution has the potential to save time and reduce errors in the manufacturing process.

title_original: Contextualizing SOC Alerts with Exposure Intelligence
description: Overview Security Operations Centers (SOCs) are on the front lines of a lopsided battle. They are navigating an overwhelming volume of alerts and a...The postContextualizing SOC Alerts with Exposure Intelligenceappeared first onXM Cyber.
title_he: Contextualizing SOC Alerts with Exposure Intelligence
summary_he: Security Operations Centers (SOCs) are struggling to keep up with the increasing volume and speed of cyber threats, but integrating Exposure Intelligence into a Continuous Threat Exposure Management (CTEM) program can help them proactively understand and mitigate risk.
details_he: SOCs are navigating an overwhelming volume of alerts and a fragmented landscape of siloed tools, constantly scrambling to address threats that evolve at an alarming pace. By integrating EDR/XDR insights into CTEM, Exposure Intelligence can provide critical 'pre-boom' context that helps SOC and Incident Response teams in their reactive duties. This includes validating sufficient agent deployment, enriching alerts with exposure intelligence, and accelerating alert triage and investigation. By empowering proactive teams and reactive teams to work together, CTEM programs can systematically identify, prioritize, and validate exposures from an attacker's perspective, ultimately reducing the risk of successful attacks.

title_original: Resurrected ‘Crimenetwork’ Marketplace Taken Down, Administrator Arrested
description: The second iteration of the German-speaking online crime marketplace had over 22,000 users and more than 100 sellers.The postResurrected ‘Crimenetwork’ Marketplace Taken Down, Administrator Arrestedappeared first onSecurityWeek.
title_he: Resurrected ‘Crimenetwork’ Marketplace Taken Down, Administrator Arrested
summary_he: הסגירה המחודשת של שוק Crimenetwork, שהושבתה לאחר 12 שנים, נכשלה ומנהלה נעצר. השוק, שהיה פעיל בעיקר בקרב דוברי גרמנית, גדל ל-22,000 משתמשים ו-100 מוכרים.
details_he: השוק Crimenetwork, שהושבתה לאחר 12 שנים, נכשלה ומנהלה נעצר. השוק, שהיה פעיל בעיקר בקרב דוברי גרמנית, גדל ל-22,000 משתמשים ו-100 מוכרים. השוק, שהיה פעיל בעיקר בקרב דוברי גרמנית, הושבת באמצעות טכנולוגיה חדשה, והצליח לגייס כ-22,000 משתמשים ו-100 מוכרים. השוק, שהיה פעיל בעיקר בקרב דוברי גרמנית, היה פעיל בעיקר בקרב דוברי גרמנית. השוק, שהיה פעיל בעיקר בקרב דוברי גרמנית, נכשל ומנהלה נעצר.

title_original: Over 500 Organizations Hit in Years-Long Phishing Campaign
description: Victims span across the aviation, critical infrastructure, energy, logistics, public administration, and technology sectors.The postOver 500 Organizations Hit in Years-Long Phishing Campaignappeared first onSecurityWeek.
title_he: Over 500 Organizations Hit in Years-Long Phishing Campaign
summary_he: Campaign של Operation HookedWing, שהחלה ב-2022, גרם לאובדן יותר מ-2,000 תוויות משתמש ופגע בלמעלה מ-500 ארגונים בתעשיות שונות.
details_he: Operation HookedWing, קמפיין תפיסה שנמשך יותר מארבע שנים, פגע בלמעלה מ-500 ארגונים בתעשיות שונות, כולל תעופה, תיירות, תשתיות קריטיות, אנרגיה, פיננסים, ממשלה, לוגיסטיקה, ניהול ציבורי וטכנולוגיה. הקמפיין, שנדון לראשונה ב-2022, המשיך לפעול ולשדרג את תשתיותיו, תוך שהוא נשאר עם מוטיבציות עיקריות. SOCRadar זיהה יותר מעשרים סרברים של פיקוח (C&C) קשורים ל-Operation HookedWing, כמו גם יותר מ-100 תחומי GitHub ויותר מעשרה תחומי הפצה על פלטפורמות אחרות.

title_original: ISC Stormcast For Monday, May 11th, 2026 https://isc.sans.edu/podcastdetail/9926, (Mon, May 11th)
description: (c) SANS Internet Storm Center. https://isc.sans.edu Creative Commons Attribution-Noncommercial 3.0 United States License.
title_he: ISC Stormcast For Monday, May 11th, 2026 https://isc.sans.edu/podcastdetail/9926, (Mon, May 11th)
summary_he: SANS Internet Storm Center released its ISC Stormcast for Monday, May 11th, 2026, providing insights into the current cyber landscape. The report covers various security topics and threats. It serves as a valuable resource for cybersecurity professionals and enthusiasts.
details_he: The ISC Stormcast is a daily podcast that offers in-depth analysis of the latest security news and trends. It covers a wide range of topics, including malware outbreaks, vulnerabilities, and emerging threats. The report is based on the expertise of the SANS Internet Storm Center team, who closely monitor the global cybersecurity landscape and provide actionable advice to help mitigate potential risks. The ISC Stormcast is available on the SANS Internet Storm Center website, and listeners can also subscribe to the podcast through various platforms.

summary_he: YARA-X 1.16.0 release includes enhancements and bug fixes, aiming to improve the tool's overall performance and stability.
details_he: The latest update, YARA-X 1.16.0, has been released by Didier Stevens, a senior handler. This release includes 4 improvements and 4 bug fixes, which are expected to enhance the tool's functionality and reduce errors. The improvements and bug fixes are part of ongoing efforts to refine YARA-X, a tool used in the field of cybersecurity.
